title: Hut 8 shares soar over 30% after scoring $9.8 billion AI data center deal set to NVIDIA specs
text: Hut 8 shares soared over 30% in pre-market trading following the announcement of a $9.8 billion AI data center deal with NVIDIA-specified infrastructure. The stock surge reflects investor enthusiasm for the company's transformation into a major AI infrastructure provider. Market Reaction: The 30%+ pre-market gain represents significant validation of Hut 8's strategy and the massive scale of the Beacon Point deal. Investors recognized the deal as transformational for the company's growth trajectory. Deal Significance: The $9.8 billion base-term contract value dwarfs the company's current annual revenue, providing multi-year revenue visibility. The deal's scale positions Hut 8 as a credible AI infrastructure player. NVIDIA Alignment: The infrastructure is built to NVIDIA's DSX reference architecture, ensuring optimization for the most demanding AI workloads. This alignment with NVIDIA's specifications enhances the facility's appeal to enterprise customers. Valuation Impact: The deal substantially increases the company's contracted cash flows and improves its financial profile, supporting higher valuation multiples. Analyst upgrades are likely to follow the announcement.
